controlDuration.untilNextTurn: until the start of their next turn

start.you: You go first. You draw 4, they draw 5.
start.ai: The opponent goes first. They draw 4, you draw 5 (compensation for going second).

start2v2: 2v2: team {{team}} goes first. Shared team HP 60.

turnEnd.you: You end your turn. Unspent gold is lost.
turnEnd.ai: The opponent ends their turn. Unspent gold is lost.

turnGoldField.you: You gain {{gold}} gold (turn {{turn}}, +{{bonus}} from the field).
turnGoldField.ai: The opponent gains {{gold}} gold (turn {{turn}}, +{{bonus}} from the field).

drawFromGrave.ai: The opponent draws "{{card}}" from the graveyard.

drawChooseDiscard: You drew {{n}} – choose {{discard}} to discard (you keep the rest).

deckEmpty.you: You have no cards left in your deck.
deckEmpty.ai: The opponent has no cards left in their deck.

deckNoDraw: No suitable card in the deck to draw.
graveNoDraw: No suitable card in the graveyard to draw.
handLimitBurn: Hand limit is 10 – "{{card}}" goes to the graveyard.
handFullBurn: Hand is full – "{{card}}" goes to the graveyard.
handFullToGrave: Hand is full – "{{card}}" goes to the graveyard.
handFullStayGrave: Hand is full – "{{card}}" stays in the graveyard.

discardForGold.ai: The opponent discards "{{card}}" and gains +100 gold ({{gold}}).

mill.you: {{n}} card(s) from your deck go to the graveyard (mill).
mill.ai: {{n}} card(s) from the opponent's deck go to the graveyard (mill).

graveToDeck.you: {{n}} of your card(s) return from the graveyard to the deck and it is reshuffled.
graveToDeck.ai: {{n}} of the opponent's card(s) return from the graveyard to the deck and it is reshuffled.

zmkReshuffle.ai: The opponent reshuffles the ZMK deck.

zmkSpecialReshuffle: Drew {{value}} – the ZMK deck is reshuffled.

zmkBias.adv: Advantage: ZMK {{a}} and {{b}} – the better one is used.
zmkBias.dis: Disadvantage: ZMK {{a}} and {{b}} – the worse one is used.

zmkRemoved: {{n}}× "{{card}}" card removed from {{owner}} ZMK deck (for the rest of the game).
zmkNoneRemoved: No "{{card}}" cards left in the ZMK deck – nothing removed.

playUnitSprint.you: You summon "{{card}}" ({{cost}} gold). ▶ Sprint – it can attack immediately!
playUnitSprint.ai: The opponent summons "{{card}}" ({{cost}} gold). ▶ Sprint – it can attack immediately!

playReaction.you: You set a face-down reaction with a {{gold}} gold token.
playReaction.ai: The opponent sets a face-down reaction with a {{gold}} gold token.

playField.you: 🌍 You play the field card "{{card}}" – it affects both players.
playField.ai: 🌍 The opponent plays the field card "{{card}}" – it affects both players.

playChampion.you: ⚜ You summon Champion "{{card}}" (phase 1)! It uses skills and does not attack.
playChampion.ai: ⚜ The opponent summons Champion "{{card}}" (phase 1)! It uses skills and does not attack.

championEvolve: ⚜ The Champion evolves to phase {{phase}} and is fully healed! Skill {{phase}} unlocked.
championNoControl: "{{src}}": a Champion cannot be taken control of.
sacrificeHand: "{{card}}" is sacrificed from hand (2 cards = 1 point for the Champion).
fieldReplaced: The old field card "{{card}}" goes to the graveyard.
fieldLastWishDeath: 🌍 Field: "{{card}}" with Last Wish dies the moment it is summoned!
fieldReduceFirst: 🌍 The field reduces the first damage to {{dmg}}.
fieldChooseReturn: 🌍 Field: choose a creature (yours or the enemy's) to return to its owner's hand.

fieldReturn.self: 🌍 Field: {{side}} returns "{{card}}" to their own hand.
fieldReturn.foe: 🌍 Field: {{side}} returns "{{card}}" to the opponent's hand.

battlecryAwaitTarget: 📣 "{{card}}" Battlecry is waiting for a target — tap the glowing card and pick a target!
lastWishResurrect: 💫 "{{card}}" dies and IS RESURRECTED — Last Wish!
lastWishResurrectHp1: 💫 "{{card}}" dies and IS RESURRECTED with 1 HP — Last Wish!
lastWishResurrectOnce: 💫 "{{card}}" dies and IS RESURRECTED (once per game) — Last Wish!
lastWishResurrectHp1Once: 💫 "{{card}}" dies and IS RESURRECTED with 1 HP (once per game) — Last Wish!
cannotDie: 🛡 "{{card}}" cannot die (aura) – it stays at 1 HP.

deathToHand.self: "{{card}}" dies and returns to your hand (Last Wish).
deathToHand.foe: "{{card}}" dies and goes to the opponent's hand (Last Wish).

deathExiled: "{{card}}" dies and is EXILED from the game (field)!
deathGrave: "{{card}}" dies and goes to the graveyard.
attackUnit: ⚔ "{{card}}" ({{atk}} ATK) attacks "{{target}}" – both draw a ZMK!
attackArtifact: ⚔ "{{card}}" attacks the artifact "{{target}}" – it takes no counter damage.
attackAgain: ⚔↻ "{{card}}" destroyed a creature – it can attack again!
frozenNoCounter: ❄ "{{card}}" is frozen – it deals no counter damage.

playerDamage.ai: The opponent takes {{dmg}} damage. {{left}} HP left.

overkill.you: ↳ {{excess}} excess damage carries over to you.
overkill.ai: ↳ {{excess}} excess damage carries over to the opponent.

auraDoublePlayerDmg: ☠×2 An aura doubles the damage to the player: {{dmg}}.
shieldNullify: ✦★ Magic Shield negates the damage to "{{card}}".
shieldNullifyNoZmk: ✦★ Magic Shield negates the damage to "{{card}}" – no ZMK is drawn.
shieldNullifyBack: ✦★ Magic Shield negates the counter damage to "{{card}}".

spellVampirism.ai: 🩸 Spell vampirism: the opponent +{{hp}} HP (spell damage {{dmg}}).

passiveDamageHeal.you: 🩸 Passive: damage taken by an enemy creature ({{dmg}}) heals you – +{{hp}} HP.
passiveDamageHeal.ai: 🩸 Passive: damage taken by an enemy creature ({{dmg}}) heals the opponent – +{{hp}} HP.

tempBuffEnd: The temporary buff on "{{card}}" has ended.
silencedUnit: 🔇 "{{card}}" loses all effects and buffs ({{atk}} ATK / {{hp}} HP).
statusImmune: 🛡✨ "{{card}}" is immune to statuses — {{status}} has no effect.
blessedUsed: "{{card}}" Blessing consumed – the attack has advantage.
controlZoneFull: "{{src}}": the creature zone is full – taking control fails.

controlStay.you: "{{card}}" cannot return to its owner (zone full) – it stays on your side.
controlStay.ai: "{{card}}" cannot return to its owner (zone full) – it stays on the opponent's side.

controlEnd.you: 🧠 Control has ended – "{{card}}" returns to you.
controlEnd.ai: 🧠 Control has ended – "{{card}}" returns to the opponent.

goldPenaltyNext.you: 🪙 You will lose {{gold}} gold at the start of your next turn ("{{src}}").
goldPenaltyNext.ai: 🪙 The opponent will lose {{gold}} gold at the start of their next turn ("{{src}}").

goldPenalty.you: 💸 You lose {{gold}} gold at the start of the turn (enemy effect). {{left}} left.
goldPenalty.ai: 💸 The opponent loses {{gold}} gold at the start of the turn (your effect). {{left}} left.

spellDiscount.you: Your next spell will cost {{gold}} gold less.
spellDiscount.ai: The opponent's next spell will cost {{gold}} gold less.

nextCardCost.ai: 🪙 The opponent's next card costs {{delta}} gold.

nextCardCostType.ai: 🪙 The opponent's next card ({{type}}) costs {{delta}} gold.

spellDamageBonus.ai: The opponent's spells now deal +{{n}} damage (total +{{total}}).

spellCountered: 🚫 The spell "{{card}}" is countered – no effect.
counterReady: 🚫 "{{src}}" is ready to counter the spell being cast.

reaction.ai: ⚡ Reaction! The opponent flips "{{card}}" – it triggers.

reactionBeforeAttack.you: ⚡ Reaction! You flip "{{card}}" – it triggers before the attack.
reactionBeforeAttack.ai: ⚡ Reaction! The opponent flips "{{card}}" – it triggers before the attack.

coin.green: 🪙 Coin flip: GREEN – the effect succeeds!
coin.red: 🪙 Coin flip: RED – the effect fails.

curseDrawn.you: You drew the planted curse "{{card}}" – its effect triggers!
curseDrawn.ai: The opponent drew the planted curse "{{card}}" – its effect triggers!

curseForced: 🕸 The curse "{{card}}" is force-activated in {{owner}} deck!
curseNoActivation: The curse "{{card}}" has no "when the victim draws" activation – nothing happens.
curseNone: "{{src}}": there are no planted curses in {{owner}} deck.
curseRaise: ⚰️→ "{{card}}" is raised from the graveyard (curse activation)!
zoneFullSummon: The creature zone is full – the summon fails.
zoneFullRaise: The creature zone is full – the raise fails.
noSummonTargetZone: No suitable creature {{zone}} – the summon fails.
targetInvalid: The target is no longer valid.
targetInvalidPart: The target is no longer valid – part of the effect does not happen.
copyNoSource: "{{src}}": there is no source creature to copy an effect from.
copyNoGraveTarget: "{{src}}": there is no creature with an effect in the graveyard.
copyChoose: Choose a creature in the graveyard whose effect to copy.
copySourceGone: Effect copy: the source creature is no longer on the board.
tutorNone: No suitable card – the tutor fails.
tutorNoneType: No suitable card ({{type}}) – the tutor fails.

tutorGain.ai: The opponent gets "{{card}}" into their hand (tutor).

tutorPick.ai: The opponent picks "{{card}}" into their hand (tutor).

chooseCardToHand: Choose a card for your hand
chooseCardToHandType: Choose a card for your hand ({{type}})
deckEmptyPeek: {{victim}} deck is empty – nothing to look at.
deckEmptyReveal: {{owner}} deck is empty – nothing to reveal.
peekChoose: You look at {{n}} cards of {{victim}} deck – choose {{k}} to discard.
peekAuto: {{caster}} looks at {{n}} cards of {{victim}} deck and discards {{k}} to the graveyard.
peekResultDiscard: {{n}} card(s) discarded to {{victim}} graveyard; the rest are put back on top of the deck.
revealOwn: {{caster}} looks at the top {{n}} cards of their own deck.
revealOther: {{caster}} looks at the top {{n}} cards of {{owner}} deck.
alchemistFort: 🏰 Alchemists' Fort: "{{card}}" is returned to {{owner}} deck.
winYou: The opponent's HP dropped to 0. YOU WIN! 🏆
winAi: Your HP dropped to 0. The opponent wins!
curseDeckEmpty: The curse side deck is empty – "{{src}}" plants no curse.
chainTooDeep: ⚠ Effect chain too deep – the "{{src}}" follow-up is skipped.
chainTooLong: ⚠ Effect cascade too long – "{{src}}" is skipped (loop guard).
noSpellToCounter: "{{src}}": there is no spell being cast to counter.
noValidTarget: "{{src}}": no valid target – part of the effect does not happen.
noAttacker: "{{src}}": there is no attacker (use onAttacked + "effect on attacker").

err.discardOncePerTurn: You can discard a card for gold only once per turn.
err.cardNotInHand: The card is not in your hand.
err.notEnoughGold: Not enough gold: cost {{cost}}, you have {{gold}}.
err.notEnoughGoldField: Not enough gold: cost {{cost}} (the field changes the cost), you have {{gold}}.
err.unitZoneFullChampion: The creature zone is full (max {{max}}, including the Champion).
err.tributePickUnit: Pick one of your creatures to sacrifice (not the Champion).
err.tributeHandNotFound: The tribute cards were not found in your hand.
err.tributeRequired: Tribute required: 1 creature from the board OR 2 cards from hand.
err.championPhaseNeeded: This card is phase {{phase}}; the Champion must be at phase {{need}} (currently {{current}}).
err.championFirstPhase: Summon a phase 1 Champion first (this card is phase {{phase}}).
err.cursesOnlyViaEffects: Curses can only be played through card effects.
err.notPhasedChampion: This is not a phased Champion.
err.onlyLowerPhase: You can only swap to a lower phase.
err.noFamilyPhaseCard: There is no phase {{phase}} card of this family in your deck.
err.noChampionOnBoard: You have no Champion on the board.
err.skillOncePerTurn: A skill can be used only once per turn.
err.championSilenced: The Champion is silenced – skills are blocked.
err.championCannotAttack: The Champion has no ATK and cannot attack – use a skill.
err.fieldAttackLimit: 🌍 The field limits attacks: max {{max}} per turn.
err.alreadyAttacked: This creature has already attacked this turn.
err.unitFrozen: ❄ The creature is frozen – it loses its action.
err.unitStunned: ✦ The creature is stunned – it cannot attack.
err.auraBlocksAttack: 🔗 An aura blocks this creature's attacks.
err.summoningSickness: The creature was summoned this turn – it can attack next turn (unless it has ▶ Sprint).
err.unitNotOnBoard: The creature is not on the board.
err.tauntMustAttack: ⊙ Taunt! You must attack a creature with Taunt.
